title: PatentDataPrefill
description: JSON Schema for the Patent Data Prefill API. This schema defines the data structure for pre-filling patent application forms via the Altinn 3 API.

contactEmail.description: Required contact email address for the patent application

contactPhoneNumber.description: Phone number of the contact person

inquiryMessage.description: Optional message or inquiry related to the application

inventionTitle.description: Title of the invention. Required when pctApplicationNumber is provided.

numberOfClaims.description: Number of claims in the patent application

acceleratedApplication.description: Whether this is an accelerated application

pctApplicationNumber.description: PCT (Patent Cooperation Treaty) application number. When provided, pctApplicationDate and inventionTitle are required.

pctApplicationDate.description: Date of the PCT application (ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD). Required when pctApplicationNumber is provided.

dividedOrDivisional.description: Application type indicator. When set, divApplicationNumber and divApplicationDate are required.

divApplicationNumber.description: Divisional application number. Required when dividedOrDivisional is set.

divApplicationDate.description: Date of the divisional application (ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD). Required when dividedOrDivisional is set.

earlierApplications.description: List of earlier applications claiming priority

agentOrApplicant.description: Indicator whether the submitter is an agent or applicant. When 'agent' or 'fullmektig', agentCustomerNumber is required.

agentCustomerNumber.description: Customer number for the agent. Required when agentOrApplicant is 'agent' or 'fullmektig'.

reasonApplicantNotSameAsInventor.description: Reason why applicant is not the same as inventor.

reasonApplicantNotSameAsInventorOtherExp.description: Free-text explanation required when reasonApplicantNotSameAsInventor is 'other'.

applicantsAndInventors.description: List of applicants and inventors associated with the patent

PrefillEarlierApplication.description: Represents an earlier application for priority claims

priorityDate.description: Priority date of the earlier application (ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD)

country.description: Country code of the earlier application (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3)

caseId.description: Case identifier for the earlier application

PrefillApplicantOrInventor.description: Represents an applicant or inventor in the patent application

personOrOrganization.description: Type indicator: 'person' requires firstName and lastName; 'organization' requires companyName

firstName.description: First name. Required when personOrOrganization is 'person'.

lastName.description: Last name. Required when personOrOrganization is 'person'.

companyName.description: Company name. Required when personOrOrganization is 'organization'.

isNorwegianPerson.description: Indicator if the person is Norwegian (when personOrOrganization is 'person')

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD). Required when isNorwegianPerson is true.
